positive: A stylized, minimal geometric illustration featuring a whimsical grouping of cosmic elements: stylized crescent moons, swirling nebulae, constellations composed of glowing geometric lines, and abstract celestial bodies. The composition should be centered and balanced, utilizing clean black lines and silhouettes against a contrasting backdrop of deep indigo and midnight blue. Incorporate contrasting pops of electric lavender, celestial gold, and muted teal. The style is elegant modern vector illustration, inspired by Art Nouveau geometry and mid-century space travel posters. The lines must be crisp, the contrast strong, and the composition perfectly centered for apparel printing, suitable for DTG transfer. Highly detailed, high contrast, vector art, sticker sheet layout, symmetrical balance.
negative: photorealistic, noisy, blurry, watermark, signature, text, logo, words, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, cartoon, dirty, cluttered, messy, gradient background, solid color background, 3d render
